Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurs across all cases
Percentage of variants that include SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment followed by SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is not immediately followed by any reviewer assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases where 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' does not happen

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment compared to SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion'

Name: Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting AE Assignment appears after SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences that lead to a rejection outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Reject or SW-EIC Reject & Resubmit)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Reject' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment events that are part of variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment relative to the total number of AE-related waiting states (e.g., SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation, SW-Awaiting EIC Decision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that eventually transitions to a revision decision (SW-EIC Major Revision or SW-EIC Minor Revision)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-EIC Major Revision'

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment instances occurring in cases that later involve reviewer reminders (Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' activities for cases where activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment that is directly preceded by SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment occurrences to SW-AE Assign Reviewers occurrences
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment in cases that ultimately result in acceptance (SW-EIC Accept)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'
